summary.en: Argentina BESS fire safety is usually handled through project approval, electrical installation, workplace safety, municipal or provincial permitting, insurer review, emergency-response planning, and owner engineering rather than a single national BESS fire certificate. Reviewers may request evidence on thermal runaway, spacing, ventilation, detection, suppression, shutdown, access, water runoff, combustible load, and Spanish emergency procedures.
summary.zh: 阿根廷BESS消防安全通常通过项目批准、电气安装、工作场所安全、市政或省级许可、保险方审查、应急响应规划和业主工程处理，而不是通过单一全国BESS消防证书处理。审查方可能要求提供热失控、间距、通风、探测、灭火、停机、通道、消防废水、火灾荷载和西班牙语应急程序证据。
summary.zht: 阿根廷BESS消防安全通常通過項目批准、電氣安裝、工作場所安全、市政或省級許可、保險方審查、應急響應規劃和業主工程處理，而不是通過單一全國BESS消防證書處理。審查方可能要求提供熱失控、間距、通風、探測、滅火、停機、通道、消防廢水、火災荷載和西班牙語應急程序證據。

standards_or_laws: Argentina workplace fire-protection duties under Decreto 351/1979 where applicable
Provincial or municipal fire and building permit requirements
Project insurer, owner, EPC, and emergency-response requirements

summary.en: China commonly relies on GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, GB/T 36558-2023, container fire design, factory fire-suppression tests, and Chinese project fire review. These documents may support Argentina due diligence but do not replace local site permits, insurer review, emergency-response acceptance, or Spanish operating procedures.
summary.zh: 中国通常依据GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 36558-2023、集装箱消防设计、工厂消防测试和中国项目消防审查。这些文件可支持阿根廷尽调，但不能替代当地现场许可、保险方审查、应急响应接受或西班牙语运行程序。
summary.zht: 中國通常依據GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 36558-2023、集裝箱消防設計、工廠消防測試和中國項目消防審查。這些文件可支持阿根廷盡調，但不能替代當地現場許可、保險方審查、應急響應接受或西班牙語運行程序。

gap.en: Localize the fire-safety package for Argentina: site layout, rack spacing, ventilation or gas management, detection and suppression logic, deflagration or exhaust assumptions where relevant, shutdown interfaces, firefighter access, water runoff controls, SDS, incident response, training records, and Spanish manuals.
gap.zh: 应为阿根廷本地化消防安全资料包：场地布置、电池架间距、通风或气体管理、探测和灭火逻辑、适用时的泄爆或排气假设、停机接口、消防通道、消防废水控制、SDS、事故响应、培训记录和西班牙语手册。
gap.zht: 應為阿根廷本地化消防安全資料包：場地佈置、電池架間距、通風或氣體管理、探測和滅火邏輯、適用時的洩爆或排氣假設、停機接口、消防通道、消防廢水控制、SDS、事故響應、培訓記錄和西班牙語手冊。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where Argentine workplace, electrical installation, provincial, municipal, fire-authority, insurer, environmental, or emergency-response review applies; no universal Argentina whole-BESS fire certificate is assumed
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval, installation location, and local fire review

source.publisher: Infoleg, Ministerio de Justicia de la Nacion Argentina

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Fire safety for Argentina BESS is a site and project approval issue. Chinese GB reports help, but Argentina-specific installation drawings, emergency procedures, and reviewer-ready fire-risk evidence are still needed.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 阿根廷BESS消防安全属于现场和项目批准问题。中国GB报告有帮助，但仍需要面向阿根廷的安装图、应急程序和可供审查的火灾风险证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 阿根廷BESS消防安全屬於現場和項目批准問題。中國GB報告有幫助，但仍需要面向阿根廷的安裝圖、應急程序和可供審查的火災風險證據。
